seo.title: FAQ | My Brand
seo.description: Frequently asked questions about ClawdPress — hosting, AI, integrations, and more.

faqs.q: Do I need a server to run my site?
faqs.a: No. ClawdPress generates static HTML files you can host anywhere — Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, S3, or even your own server.

faqs.q: How does the Claude AI integration work?
faqs.a: You bring your own Anthropic API key. ClawdPress sends your content to Claude for suggestions, rewrites, and SEO optimisation — your data stays yours.

faqs.q: Can I add a contact form or ecommerce?
faqs.a: Yes. Connect Supabase for forms, auth, and a light database. Add Stripe via Supabase Edge Functions for payments.
